data.title: JPMorgan Raises S&P 500 Target for 2026
data.description: JPMorgan has revised its target for the S&P 500 index by the end of 2026, increasing it to 7,600 points from the previous target of 7,200 points. According to ChainCatcher, this adjustment reflects the bank's updated outlook on the market's performance over the next few years.

data.title: Teen's Social Media Accounts Targeted Amid ASTEROID Meme Coin Narrative
data.description: On April 21, a 15-year-old girl named Liv Perrotto became the center of attention in the ASTEROID meme coin narrative. According to BlockBeats, her mother reported that Liv's social media accounts were hacked, and she did not post any content related to cryptocurrency. Attempts were made to breach her phone, email, Facebook, and other accounts.

data.title: A wallet created only four weeks ago withdrew 80,000 ETH from Binance, worth over $180 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a wallet created only four weeks ago withdrew 80,000 ETH from Binance, worth $184.7 million.

data.title: Justin Sun Highlights Security and AI Developments at Hong Kong Web3 Carnival
data.description: During the 2026 Hong Kong Web3 Carnival, Justin Sun addressed the issue of theft across various blockchain protocols. According to Foresight News, Sun emphasized that the trust users place in Tron is largely due to its stable, secure, and predictable environment. He also mentioned plans to enhance quantum computing resistance to bolster security further. Additionally, Sun noted that AI serves as an accelerator for transitioning Web3 from the laboratory to real-world operations, with related AI agents currently undergoing testing.

data.title: Asteroid Creator's Social Media Accounts Compromised
data.description: An Asteroid-related creator's mother reported that her social media accounts were hacked. According to Odaily, the breach affected multiple accounts, including her phone, email, and Facebook. She emphasized that recent cryptocurrency-related content circulating online was not posted by her.

data.title: U.S. and Iran Nearing Agreement, Says White House Press Secretary
data.description:
The White House Press Secretary, Levitt, stated in an interview with Fox News on the evening of the 20th that the United States and Iran are on the verge of reaching an agreement. According to Odaily, Levitt mentioned that the U.S. has never been closer to securing a truly beneficial deal. However, she did not disclose any details about the current state of negotiations.

Levitt emphasized that even if an agreement is not reached, U.S. President Donald Trump has multiple options at his disposal and is not afraid to use them. Previous actions have demonstrated that Trump is not merely bluffing.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Chinese Gold Jewelry Prices Remain Stable
data.description: On April 21, Jin10 reported that the prices of gold jewelry in China have shown little change compared to previous rates. According to Jin10, several brands continue to offer gold jewelry within the range of 1,460 yuan to 1,465 yuan per gram. Chow Sang Sang's pure gold jewelry is priced at the highest, at 1,469 yuan per gram.

data.title: Nansen Upgrades API with Pay-Per-Use Model for Blockchain Data Access
data.description:
On April 21, blockchain analytics firm Nansen announced a comprehensive upgrade to its on-chain data API, introducing a pay-per-use model based on the x402 protocol and PayAI infrastructure. According to BlockBeats, this new system allows users to make small payments in USDC for immediate access to wallet profiles, token flows, and smart money signals, eliminating the need for monthly subscriptions, mandatory approvals, or long-term contracts.

Nansen highlighted that traditional subscription models are not user-friendly for AI agents and developers. AI agents often require intermittent queries followed by idle periods, while developers face uncertain future demands during prototype testing, and researchers are locked into unnecessary fixed costs. The new solution is built around the open-source payment standard x402: when a request is made to access a paid endpoint, the server returns a 402 Payment Required status code, specifying the amount, currency, and chain information. The client completes an on-chain USDC transaction and provides a payment receipt to access the data. This entire request-invoice-payment-delivery process is fully programmable, allowing AI agents to autonomously complete payments.

Nansen's API offers two pricing tiers, both settled in USDC on the Base or Solana chains. The basic tier charges $0.01 per call, providing access to core data such as token filtering, wallet balances and history, DEX transactions, and profit and loss summaries. The advanced tier charges $0.05 per call, unlocking exclusive signals like smart money net flows, position distribution, and profit and loss leaderboards. In practical applications, a smart money alert system costs approximately $0.15 per run, wallet profile analysis about $0.07, and token research around $0.07.

data.title: Iran Condemns U.S. Military Action in Gulf of Oman
data.description:
On April 21, Iran's Foreign Ministry issued a statement strongly condemning the U.S. military's attack on an Iranian cargo ship in the Gulf of Oman on April 19. According to BlockBeats, Iran has demanded the immediate release of the seized vessel and its crew.

Iranian media reports that the statement described the attack and the detention of the crew as acts of piracy and terrorism, violating the ceasefire agreement between the two nations and constituting an act of aggression against Iran. The statement warned the United States that such actions could lead to very dangerous consequences.

The Iranian Foreign Ministry emphasized that the U.S. bears full responsibility for further complicating the regional situation.

data.title: Trader Utilizes Leverage for HYPE Short Position and PAXG Long Position
data.description: On April 21, a trader known as Loracle has reportedly established a short position on HYPE using five times leverage, valued at $11 million, according to BlockBeats. The trader continues to increase this position. Additionally, Loracle holds a long position in 374.66 PAXG gold tokens.

data.title: White House: US and Iran are on the "edge" of reaching an agreement.
data.description: White House Press Secretary Janet Levitt stated in an interview with Fox News on the evening of the 20th that the United States and Iran are on the "edge" of reaching an agreement. Levitt said, "The United States has never been closer to reaching a truly good agreement." However, she did not disclose any information regarding the current status of the negotiations. Levitt stated that even if an agreement is not reached, President Trump still has multiple options and is not afraid to use these means. Previous actions have proven that Trump is not "bluffing." (Xinhua)

data.title: The KelpDAO hackers still hold 75,700 ETH on the Ethereum blockchain, worth $175 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the Arbitrum chain project team froze 30,766 ETH (worth $70.97 million) held by the KelpDAO hacker on the Arbitrum chain. Through technical means, they transferred these 30,766 ETH from the hacker's wallet to an address controlled by the Arbitrum chain: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000da0. After recovering these 30,766 ETH, the hacker still holds 75,700 ETH (worth $175 million) on the Ethereum chain.

data.title: The Smarter Web Company completes approximately $2 million private placement.
data.description: The Smarter Web Company, a UK-based Bitcoin treasury company, announced that it has completed a private placement of 4,286,410 ordinary shares under a previously signed subscription agreement. The total proceeds from the placement were approximately £1,537,400 (approximately US$2 million, before fees), or approximately £0.36 per share. The company expects to receive approximately 98.25% of the net proceeds. The remaining outstanding ordinary shares under the subscription agreement are 52,377,540.

data.title: China's Aviation Market Faces Increased Flight Cancellations Ahead of May Day Holiday
data.description:
As reported by Jin10 on April 21, the Chinese aviation market is experiencing a surge in travel bookings with less than ten days until the May Day holiday. According to statistics from Flight Manager DAST, the total number of planned flights for the 2026 May Day holiday is 85,285, marking a 5.25% increase compared to 2025. However, the cancellation rate for international routes has risen sharply from 3.6% to 7.4%, with domestic airlines experiencing an even higher cancellation rate of 10.7% for international routes.

Sources from local travel agencies in Guangzhou indicate that the majority of canceled flights are from routes departing from some second-tier cities, with minimal impact on the Guangzhou market. Southeast Asia, Europe, Central Asia, and the Caucasus region remain popular travel destinations.

Airlines are expected to adjust flight schedules further during the peak summer travel season, taking into account changes in fuel prices and market conditions. Additionally, some citizens have noted that, besides rising airfare prices, inflation in many outbound travel destinations has significantly increased expenses for hotels and dining. Considering cost and safety factors, many travelers prefer domestic trips.

data.title: Trader Loracle opened a short position in HYPE with 5x leverage; the current position is worth $11 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, trader Loracle opened a 5x leveraged short position in HYPE, currently valued at $11 million, and the position is still increasing. He also holds a 5x leveraged long position in PAXG, currently holding 374.66 PAXG.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $67.7696 million yesterday, marking the eighth consecutive day of net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $67.7696 million yesterday (April 20th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a net inflow of $76.0522 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.906 billion. This was followed by BlackRock Stalled ETH ETF ETHB, with a net inflow of $13.1941 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $408 million. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE, with a net outflow of $17.0505 million, bringing its historical total net outflow to $5.215 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is $13.765 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) is 4.88%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $12.011 billion.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETFs Experience Significant Inflows and Outflows
data.description:
Ethereum spot ETFs saw notable financial movements on April 20, according to ChainCatcher. Data from SoSoValue indicated a total net inflow of $67.77 million for Ethereum spot ETFs on that day.

The Blackrock ETF ETHA recorded the highest single-day net inflow, amounting to $76.05 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.906 billion. Following this, the Blackrock Staked ETH ETF ETHB had a net inflow of $13.19 million, with its historical total reaching $408 million.

Conversely, the Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE experienced the largest single-day net outflow, totaling $17.05 million, with its historical total net outflow now at $5.215 billion.

As of the latest update, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $13.765 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio of 4.88% relative to Ethereum's total market capitalization. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $12.011 billion.

data.title: SpaceX holds closed-door talks with Wall Street ahead of its IPO, planning to reserve approximately 30% of its shares for retail investors.
data.description: SpaceX will hold a three-day closed-door analyst meeting in the US this week to present its business and strategy to Wall Street firms in preparation for a potential IPO. Sources say the company aims to raise approximately $75 billion, valuing the company at $1.75 trillion, with a listing planned as early as June. The meeting will cover SpaceX's Starbase launch site in Texas and its data center project in Tennessee. Participating analysts will be required to hand over electronic devices to ensure confidentiality. This roadshow is a crucial step in the IPO process, followed by a model presentation to further disclose financial and growth expectations. In addition, the company plans to reserve approximately 30% of its shares for retail investors and expand into global markets. Several Wall Street investment banks have already participated in the underwriting arrangements. (Reuters)

data.title: TRON to Launch AI Avatar 'Brother Sun 1.0' Amid Broader AI Initiatives
data.description: Justin Sun announced at the 2026 Hong Kong Web3 Carnival that his personal AI avatar, 'Brother Sun 1.0,' will be launched next week. According to NS3.AI, this development is part of TRON's larger strategy to integrate artificial intelligence into its ecosystem. Sun highlighted that B.AI is working on creating blockchain-based financial infrastructure tailored for AI agents. Additionally, TRON is focusing on enhancing its systems with quantum attack resistance capabilities.

data.title: ASTEROID's market capitalization surpassed a new high of $200 million, surging over 48% intraday.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of the Ethereum blockchain's Meme coin ASTEROID has surpassed a new high of $200 million, currently trading at $196 million, representing a daily increase of over 48%. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.
